room.text: A dragon sleeps in the corridor. Move quietly or he will wake.
The dragon stirs restlessly. You must be absolutely silent to pass.
A guard blocks the gate. Politely ask him to move or greet him quietly to pass.
The guard looks furious today. Only a greeting will calm him down.
A sacred temple door demands a whisper of the password.
The temple feels more sacred than usual. Whisper the password even more softly.
